message:
chore(beads): mark masked_invalid wrapper parity in progress (franken_numpy-lqpc)

Flip franken_numpy-lqpc (numpy.ma: masked_invalid wrapper parity)
from open to in_progress so br ready stops surfacing it while an
agent is actively wiring the masked_invalid helper through
fnp-python with NumPy-matching keep_mask / copy semantics.

Pure issue-tracker bookkeeping — no source code changes.
